source_pr.title: planner: unsigned pk cannot be pushed as index column
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

It's a hard work to keep data in order if the index range contains unsigned pk since the pk is the last column not the first column.

### What is changed and how it works?

Disabled it when the pk is unsigned.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) where b = 1 order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "9223372036854775808 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) where b = 1 order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "9223372036854775808 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t use index(idx) where b = 1 order by b, a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "9223372036854775808 1")) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: executor/executor_test.go, planner/cascades/optimize_test.go, planner/core/indexmerge_test.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, planner/core/logical_plans.go, planner/core/mock.go, planner/core/physical_plan_test.go, planner/core/preprocess_test.go, planner/implementation/base_test.go, planner/memo/group_test.go
